    1. timeChanged(TimeEvent)

Interface TimeListener

All Superinterfaces:
EventListener
All Known Implementing Classes:
AlarmClock, BasicClock, ChronometerClock, Clock, CountdownClock
Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface TimeListener extends EventListener
Listener interface for receiving chronological update events from a TimeServer. * @version 1.1
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    timeChanged(TimeEvent event)
    Invoked when a time change occurs on the monitored TimeServer.

  • Method Details

    • timeChanged

      void timeChanged(TimeEvent event)
      Invoked when a time change occurs on the monitored TimeServer.
      Parameters:
      event - the event containing the new time state
